_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
| Date | Event | Status | What the workspace must have done |
|---|---|---|---|
| 14 December 2022 | CSRD published in Official Journal | **In force** | — |
| 22 December 2023 | ESRS published in Official Journal | **In force** | — |
| 1 January 2024 | FY2024 reporting period begins for Wave 1 companies | **In force** | Wave 1 clients began accumulating data the workspace needs to supply |
| 2025 (Wave 1 reporting) | Wave 1 companies publish first CSRD reports covering FY2024 data | **In force / Active** | Workspace must be able to supply Scope 3 transport emissions data on request from Wave 1 clients now |
| 11 July 2025 | ESRS "quick-fix" delegated act adopted | **In force** | Note: Wave 1 clients' FY2025 and FY2026 data demands will not expand beyond FY2024 demands |
| 14 April 2025 | Political agreement — stop-the-clock Directive | **Political agreement reached; formal adoption pending** | Wave 2 and Wave 3 reporting deferred; specific new dates require formal adoption confirmation. *Legal Confirmation Required.* |
| 9 December 2025 | Political agreement — Omnibus I simplification package | **Political agreement reached; formal adoption pending** | Employee threshold proposed to rise to 1,000; not yet operative law. *Legal Confirmation Required re: workspace's direct-scope status.* |
| TBC (post-Omnibus I formal adoption) | Revised CSRD thresholds enter into force | **Pending** | Confirm workspace's direct-scope status under amended law |
| TBC (post-EFRAG consultation) | Revised ESRS published | **Pending** | Confirm whether transport-mode-specific data requirements change |

*Source: European Commission — Corporate Sustainability Reporting, DG FISMA, last updated 9 December 2025. https://finance.ec.europa.eu/capital-markets-union-and-financial-markets/company-reporting-and-auditing/company-reporting/corporate-sustainability-reporting_en*

*Source: EUR-Lex — CSRD (2022/2464/EU). https://eur-lex.europa.eu*

---
